reasoning: Koren, this ride targets your poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. Based on your last ride and with the goal of conquering the Alpine Loop, we'll build aerobic endurance and address that observed power drop-off.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4x10 min blocks with 5 min at 201-218W, then 5 min at 242-256W

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
